title: Cross region archive overview (Archival)
summary: Cross region archive overview — archival workflow walkthrough.

content.text:
## Goal

Demonstrate "cross region archive (overview)" against the Tinybox archival surface end to end.

## Walkthrough

# Step 1 — prepare a bucket for the archival workflow.
tinybox buckets create my-bucket --region us-east-1
Apply the recipe; verify with the API reference under [API reference](/docs/api/buckets/get).
